vehicles.trans: 6-speed Tiptronic or 7-speed S-tronic DSG (varies by year)
vehicles.slot: Tiptronic: slot near shift lever base. S-tronic DSG: slot near electronic selector
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the electronic selector override: Tiptronic: slot near shift lever base. S-tronic DSG: slot near electronic selector.
Remove trim panel or cover if present — use a trim pry tool or your fingernail at the edge.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the exposed slot.
Press firmly inward and hold.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Press the N button or move the electronic selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and select N normally on the electronic selector.
Electronic selectors require power — mechanical override is a last resort only.
vehicles.notes: Battery location varies: often under rear seat. A3 8P (2006-2013), 8V (2014-2020), 8Y (2021+).
vehicles.warn: S-tronic DSG: NEVER tow with wheels on ground. Flatbed only.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. Quattro AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

knownIssues.title: DSG/S-tronic Requires Power to Shift
knownIssues.detail: S-tronic dual-clutch transmission requires 12V power to shift to neutral. Battery is often located under the rear seat — not under the hood. Jump the 12V battery first, then shift.

knownIssues.title: Battery Not Under Hood
knownIssues.detail: Battery location varies by generation — frequently under the rear seat or in the trunk. Do not waste time looking under the hood first.

battery.location: Under rear seat (most) or trunk — varies by generation
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused jump terminal near firewall, black ground bolt on strut tower
battery.warnings: Never jump directly at battery — use hood terminals only. AGM battery requires AGM-compatible charger.

vehicles.slot: B6/B7: slot near shift lever base. B8/B9 (2009+): slot at electronic selector base
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the electronic selector override: B6/B7: slot near shift lever base. B8/B9 (2009+): slot at electronic selector base.
Remove trim panel or cover if present — use a trim pry tool or your fingernail at the edge.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the exposed slot.
Press firmly inward and hold.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Press the N button or move the electronic selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — In trunk under floor panel (B8/B9). Under hood (B6/B7). Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and select N normally on the electronic selector.
Electronic selectors require power — mechanical override is a last resort only.
vehicles.notes: B9 (2017+) may use electronic rotary/selector shifter. Battery in trunk.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. Quattro AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.location: In trunk under floor panel (B8/B9). Under hood (B6/B7).
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Always use hood jump terminals — jumping directly at the trunk battery can cause ECU damage. AGM rated jump pack required.

vehicles.slot: Slot near electronic selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the electronic selector override: Slot near electronic selector base on console.
Remove trim panel or cover if present — use a trim pry tool or your fingernail at the edge.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the exposed slot.
Press firmly inward and hold.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Press the N button or move the electronic selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — In trunk under panel. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and select N normally on the electronic selector.
Electronic selectors require power — mechanical override is a last resort only.
vehicles.notes: S-tronic DSG on most variants — power preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. Quattro AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals only. AGM jump pack required.

vehicles.slot: C5/C6: slot at shifter base. C7/C8 (2012+): slot at electronic selector base
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the electronic selector override: C5/C6: slot at shifter base. C7/C8 (2012+): slot at electronic selector base.
Remove trim panel or cover if present — use a trim pry tool or your fingernail at the edge.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the exposed slot.
Press firmly inward and hold.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Press the N button or move the electronic selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — In trunk under floor (C7/C8). Under hood (C5/C6). Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and select N normally on the electronic selector.
Electronic selectors require power — mechanical override is a last resort only.
vehicles.notes: C8 uses fully electronic selector with N button.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. Quattro AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.location: In trunk under floor (C7/C8). Under hood (C5/C6).
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals only. AGM jump pack.

vehicles.slot: 1st gen (2012-2018): rotary selector base slot. 2nd gen (2019+): electronic selector slot
shift: IMPORTANT: This vehicle uses a ROTARY DIAL selector on the center console — there is NO gear lever.
Turn ignition to ON (do not start).
Shift lock slot is at the BASE of the rotary dial — 1st gen (2012-2018): rotary selector base slot. 2nd gen (2019+): electronic selector slot.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot at the dial base.
Press inward firmly while rotating the dial toward N.
Verify N is shown on the display.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — In trunk under floor panel. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once powered, press brake and rotate dial to N normally.
vehicles.notes: 1st gen uses MMI rotary shifter — rotate counterclockwise toward N.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — Quattro AWD cannot be disabled. If no flatbed available, use wheel-lift with dollies on free-rolling axle.
towNotes: FULL-TIME AWD: Cannot disengage AWD. Flatbed is the safest method. If using wheel-lift, dollies MUST be used on the free-rolling axle to prevent driveline damage.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals only. AGM jump pack.

vehicles.slot: D2/D3: slot at selector base. D4/D5 (2010+): slot under trim near electronic selector
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the electronic selector override: D2/D3: slot at selector base. D4/D5 (2010+): slot under trim near electronic selector.
Remove trim panel or cover if present — use a trim pry tool or your fingernail at the edge.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the exposed slot.
Press firmly inward and hold.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Press the N button or move the electronic selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and select N normally on the electronic selector.
Electronic selectors require power — mechanical override is a last resort only.
vehicles.notes: D5 (2018+): slot concealed under trim piece. Air suspension — check clearance before flatbed.
vehicles.warn: AWD. Air suspension: verify clearance before loading on flatbed.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — Quattro AWD cannot be disabled. If no flatbed available, use wheel-lift with dollies on free-rolling axle.
towNotes: FULL-TIME AWD: Cannot disengage AWD. Flatbed is the safest method. If using wheel-lift, dollies MUST be used on the free-rolling axle to prevent driveline damage.
AIR SUSPENSION: May lower/raise unexpectedly. Verify ride height is stable before loading on flatbed. Some models have a 'jack mode' or 'transport mode' — check with owner if possible.

battery.location: In trunk or under rear seat — varies by generation
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals only. AGM jump pack. Air suspension may drop with dead battery.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle has a S-tronic dual-clutch transmission — it requires 12V power to shift reliably.
Locate the shift lock slot — Small slot near selector base on console.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot.
Press firmly and hold.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.

S-tronic REQUIRES POWER: Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
If mechanical slot is used without power: S-tronic transmissions may resist — apply steady firm pressure and hold for several seconds.
vehicles.notes: S-tronic DSG — power required in most cases.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. Quattro AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.location: Under hood or under rear seat — varies
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal, black ground bolt

vehicles.slot: Slot at selector base — small trim cap must be removed first
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle has a S-tronic dual-clutch transmission — it requires 12V power to shift reliably.
Locate the shift lock slot — Slot at selector base — small trim cap must be removed first.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot.
Press firmly and hold.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
S-tronic REQUIRES POWER: Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood or in trunk — varies by year. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
If mechanical slot is used without power: S-tronic transmissions may resist — apply steady firm pressure and hold for several seconds.
vehicles.notes: 2017+ Q5 uses 7-speed S-tronic. Earlier models use Tiptronic.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — Quattro AWD cannot be disabled. If no flatbed available, use wheel-lift with dollies on free-rolling axle.
towNotes: FULL-TIME AWD: Cannot disengage AWD. Flatbed is the safest method. If using wheel-lift, dollies MUST be used on the free-rolling axle to prevent driveline damage.

battery.location: Under hood or in trunk — varies by year
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals only. AGM jump pack.

vehicles.slot: Slot at selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: Slot at selector base on center console.
Pry off the cap or cover if present using your ignition key or a small flathead.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.

Battery is in the spare tire well under the cargo floor. Lift the cargo panel to access. Connect jump pack directly to battery terminals. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
If power cannot be restored, use the shift lock slot above — Slot at selector base on center console.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — Quattro AWD cannot be disabled. If no flatbed available, use wheel-lift with dollies on free-rolling axle.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
FULL-TIME AWD: Cannot disengage AWD. Flatbed is the safest method. If using wheel-lift, dollies MUST be used on the free-rolling axle to prevent driveline damage.
AIR SUSPENSION: May lower/raise unexpectedly. Verify ride height is stable before loading on flatbed. Some models have a 'jack mode' or 'transport mode' — check with owner if possible.

knownIssues.title: Air Suspension Clearance Risk
knownIssues.detail: Air suspension can lower unexpectedly when power is lost or the vehicle sits for an extended period. Verify ride height is stable before attempting to load on flatbed. Some trims have a 'transport mode' — check if accessible.

knownIssues.title: Battery in Spare Tire Well
knownIssues.detail: 12V battery is located in the spare tire well under the cargo floor — not under the hood. Open the rear hatch and pull up the cargo floor to access jump terminals.

battery.location: In spare tire well under cargo floor — lift cargo panel, remove spare
battery.jumpTerminals: Terminals directly on battery in spare tire well
battery.warnings: Must remove cargo floor panel and spare tire cover to access. AGM battery. Q7 PHEV: 12V auxiliary only — never touch HV battery.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — slot under a trim piece on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the electronic selector override: Electronic selector — slot under a trim piece on center console.
Remove trim panel or cover if present — use a trim pry tool or your fingernail at the edge.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the exposed slot.
Press firmly inward and hold.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Press the N button or move the electronic selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Open the trunk — battery is under cargo floor in trunk. Connect jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and select N normally on the electronic selector.
Electronic selectors require power — mechanical override is a last resort only.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — Quattro AWD cannot be disabled. If no flatbed available, use wheel-lift with dollies on free-rolling axle.
towNotes: FULL-TIME AWD: Cannot disengage AWD. Flatbed is the safest method. If using wheel-lift, dollies MUST be used on the free-rolling axle to prevent driveline damage.
AIR SUSPENSION: May lower/raise unexpectedly. Verify ride height is stable before loading on flatbed. Some models have a 'jack mode' or 'transport mode' — check with owner if possible.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under trunk floor panel — direct battery access

vehicles.model: e-tron / e-tron GT / Q4 e-tron / Q8 e-tron
vehicles.slot: Electronic gear selector — shift lock slot near selector base
shift: Turn the Audi e-tron / e-tron GT / Q4 e-tron / Q8 e-tron to ON/Ready mode.
Shift lock slot: Electronic gear selector — shift lock slot near selector base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot and press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding the slot.
Move selector to N.
FLATBED ONLY — do not tow with driven wheels on the ground.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Open the trunk — battery is e-tron: under hood. e-tron gt: in trunk. q4: under floor. q8 e-tron: cargo area. Connect jump pack. 12V AUXILIARY BATTERY ONLY — never touch the high-voltage battery pack.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
FLATBED ONLY.
vehicles.notes: 800V HV system — NEVER touch HV components.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. Never tow with driven wheels on ground.
towNotes: ELECTRIC VEHICLE: FLATBED ONLY — never tow with any driven wheels on the ground. Regenerative braking system can damage motor/inverter.
If vehicle must be moved short distance without flatbed, use dollies under ALL driven wheels.
12V battery ONLY for jumping — NEVER touch or access the high-voltage (HV) system. HV components are marked with ORANGE cables/covers.
AIR SUSPENSION: May lower/raise unexpectedly. Verify ride height is stable before loading on flatbed. Some models have a 'jack mode' or 'transport mode' — check with owner if possible.

battery.location: e-tron: under hood. e-tron GT: in trunk. Q4: under floor. Q8 e-tron: cargo area
battery.jumpTerminals: Varies by model — see location. 12V auxiliary terminals only.
battery.warnings: NEVER touch HV orange cables or connectors. 800V system on e-tron GT. Only 12V auxiliary battery for jumping.

vehicles.trans: 6-speed manual or 5-speed automatic (09A Tiptronic) or 6-speed S-tronic DSG (later)
vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral normally.
Quattro AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.notes: Manual: depress clutch, select Neutral. DSG/S-tronic: power strongly preferred. Quattro: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.warn: Quattro AWD: flatbed preferred. DSG: restore power before shifting.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. Quattro: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front.
Quattro AWD: flatbed preferred — permanent AWD cannot be easily disengaged.
DSG dual-clutch: always restore 12V power before attempting shift.

vehicles.trans: 6-speed manual or 6-speed S-tronic DSG or 7-speed S-tronic
vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console; DSG: slot on side of selector housing
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
DSG/S-tronic: REQUIRES 12V POWER to shift — restore battery first.
Locate the shift lock slot near the gear selector base or on the side of the selector housing.
Insert a thin flathead and press firmly.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move or push the selector to Neutral.
Manual: depress clutch fully, move to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
DSG/S-tronic: MUST restore 12V power — cannot shift without it.
Once powered, shift to Neutral normally.
Quattro: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.notes: DSG/S-tronic: always restore power. Manual: depress clutch. Quattro: flatbed preferred. Low clearance on all generations.
vehicles.warn: DSG: MUST restore power before shifting. Quattro: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. Quattro: flatbed preferred. Low clearance — use flatbed ramps.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front.
Quattro AWD: flatbed preferred.
DSG: cannot shift without 12V power — jump battery first.

knownIssues.title: DSG/S-tronic Cannot Shift Without Power
knownIssues.detail: Audi DSG and S-tronic dual-clutch transmissions are electro-hydraulic. Without 12V power they will not shift out of Park. Always jump the battery before attempting any shift override.

battery.warnings: DSG: must restore power before shifting.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral normally.
FLATBED PREFERRED — permanent Quattro AWD.
vehicles.notes: All Allroad variants are full-time Quattro AWD — flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED PREFERRED — permanent Quattro AWD. Wheel-lift with dollies if no flatbed.
towNotes: Permanent Quattro AWD — cannot disengage. Flatbed is safest.
Wheel-lift with dollies on free-rolling axle if flatbed unavailable.

battery.warnings: 2008+ uses AGM battery — use AGM-compatible jump pack. Permanent AWD — flatbed preferred.

vehicles.trans: 6-speed R-tronic single-clutch robot (Gen 1) or 7-speed S-tronic DSG (Gen 1 later) or 7-speed S-tronic (Gen 2)
vehicles.slot: Console-mounted selector or paddle shifters — override slot behind or under selector housing
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
R-tronic (Gen 1): REQUIRES 12V power — restore battery, then push paddle or move selector to Neutral.
S-tronic/DSG (Gen 1 late/Gen 2): REQUIRES 12V power — restore battery, then use shift slot or paddle.
Locate the override slot on the side or rear of the selector housing.
Insert a thin flathead, press firmly, hold, press brake, move to Neutral.
Without power, these transmissions will strongly resist and may not release — always jump first.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is under hood in the REAR ENGINE compartment or frunk depending on generation — see notes.
Gen 1 (2008-2015): battery in the FRONT storage area (frunk-like compartment behind front axle).
Gen 2 (2016+): battery under hood at front or rear — verify location.
Restore 12V power, then shift to Neutral.
FLATBED ONLY — very low clearance, mid/rear-engine, high value.
vehicles.notes: Mid-engine (V10) or rear-engine. Battery location: Gen 1 in front storage compartment. ALWAYS verify battery location before jumping. Very high value — FLATBED ONLY.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. Battery NOT under conventional hood. Very high-value vehicle.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — very low ground clearance, mid/rear-engine layout, very high value.
towNotes: FLATBED ONLY — extremely low clearance, high value.
Battery location NOT conventional — verify before jumping.
R-tronic and S-tronic both require 12V power to shift.

knownIssues.title: Non-Standard Battery Location
knownIssues.detail: The R8 battery is NOT under a conventional hood. Gen 1 (2008-2015): 12V battery is in the front storage compartment accessible from outside near the front wheels or frunk area. Always locate the battery before jumping — do not assume standard location.

knownIssues.title: Transmission Requires Power to Shift
knownIssues.detail: Both the R-tronic (Gen 1) and S-tronic (Gen 1 later/Gen 2) cannot shift without 12V power. Always restore battery power before attempting Neutral.

battery.location: Gen 1: FRONT storage compartment (not engine bay). Gen 2: verify location — typically front compartment or under hood.
battery.jumpTerminals: Front storage compartment or under hood — verify before connecting
battery.warnings: Battery NOT in engine bay on Gen 1. FLATBED ONLY. Very high value.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console; DSG: slot on selector housing
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
DSG/S-tronic: REQUIRES 12V power — restore battery first.
Locate the shift lock slot near the selector base.
Insert key or thin flathead, press firmly, hold, press brake, move to Neutral.
Manual: depress clutch, select Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
DSG: must restore 12V power — cannot shift without it.
Once powered, shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: Small crossover. DSG: power required. Manual: depress clutch. Quattro: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.warn: DSG: restore power before shifting. Quattro: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. Quattro: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front.
Quattro AWD: flatbed preferred.
DSG: cannot shift without power — jump battery first.

battery.warnings: AGM battery. DSG: must restore power before shifting.
